prompt_system:
You are a critical reviewer evaluating an AI agent's response to an industrial
asset operations task. Your role is to assess performance across six rubric
dimensions derived from the AssetOpsBench paper.

Respond ONLY with a valid JSON object — no markdown, no extra text.
raw_response:
{
    "task_completion": false,
    "data_retrieval_accuracy": false,
    "generalized_result_verification": false,
    "agent_sequence_correct": false,
    "clarity_and_justification": false,
    "hallucinations": true,
    "suggestions": "The agent's DGA diagnosis was 'Normal / Inconclusive' but it proceeded as if it was 'Partial Discharge'. The agent should have used the actual DGA diagnosis to determine the fault mode. The agent also failed to properly correlate the DGA results with the failure mode catalogue and didn't prioritize sensors based on the actual failure mode characteristics."
}

parsed_dims.suggestions: The agent's DGA diagnosis was 'Normal / Inconclusive' but it proceeded as if it was 'Partial Discharge'. The agent should have used the actual DGA diagnosis to determine the fault mode. The agent also failed to properly correlate the DGA results with the failure mode catalogue and didn't prioritize sensors based on the actual failure mode characteristics.
